nodes.name: String Functions
nodes.expr:
Account.Order.Product.{
  "original": `Product Name`,
  "upper": $uppercase(`Product Name`),
  "trimmedCategory": $trim(Category),
  "firstWord": $substringBefore(`Product Name`, " "),
  "containsHat": $contains(`Product Name`, /hat/i),
  "slug": $slug(`Product Name`)
}
